reviews.author: Jason Uchima
reviews.text: I very much trust her work, it's good work.

reviews.author: Kim Geater
reviews.text: I asked if they needed a tetanus shot before doing my kids van, it was that bad. When they were done it was better than new!

reviews.author: Sab Baftija
reviews.text: Removed chemical stains from a car like no other. Went above and beyond to make sure it was perfect!

reviews.author: TC
reviews.text: When you're speaking about one of the greats, you gotta mention her 10/10 service and kindness. It's unmatched.

notes: Strong detail review data. 117 Google reviews at 5.0 stars. 4 verbatim text reviews captured. Excluded 1 mixed review (Dominik Austin) per research recommendation — not appropriate for site display. Business is Black-owned AND women-owned. Previously operated as Miami Style Detail LLC before rebrand.

capture_attempts.reason: share link redirects to blocked Maps
